english translation text: Dua “Allahumma Ya Shahida Kulli Najwa- - -” (Mafatul Jinan Pg 253)
In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
O my Allah! O He who sees clearly through what hearts and minds desire secretly
makes good and settles all complaints
knows full well the ins and outs of whatever is kept undisclosed
the ultimate fulfillment of all desires!
O He who is the prime source of happiness for the (faithful) servants!
O He who deals with gently and grants favours!
O He who gives without strings attached!

arabic text: يا جَوادُ يا مَنْ لا يُواري مِنْهُ لَيْلٌ داج
english translation text: O He who is not unaware of the covering darkness of nights
the roaring clamour of the seas
the supporting columns (substance) of the skies
the locked, shut up hindrance of disorder!
O He for whom (whatever is in) darkness is as visible as (in) light!
I beseech Thee in the name of the splendour of Thy kind and gentle style

arabic text: الَّذى تَجَلَّيْتَ بِهِ لِلْجَبَلِ فَجَعَلْتَهُ دَكَّاً
english translation text: that made bright the "view" on the mountain, by leveling it to the ground
the flash of which made Moosa prostrate himself in adoration

arabic text: وَبِاِسْمِكَ الَّذى رَفَعْتَ بِهِ السَّماواتِ بِلا عَمَد
english translation text: and in the name of Thy name that has raised (suspended) the skies without (supporting) pillars

arabic text: وَسَطَحْتَ بِهِ الاَْرْضَ عَلى وَجْهِ ماء جَمَد
english translation text: and spread the earth on the stable surface of the water
in the name of Thy pure name written clearly
kept well guarded and treasured
which brings results whenever invoked
grants favours whenever a request is made
in the name of Thy Holy, Sacred and Decisive name

arabic text: الَّذى هُوَ نوُرٌ عَلى كُلِّ نُور
english translation text: which is superior to all lights
a "light" that lights up all lights
the earth got split when came into contact with it
the heavens made an opening when it reached there
and when it came near the Arsh (Divine seat of authority) it went wild with joy (rapt in delight)

arabic text: وَبِاِسْمِكَ الَّذى تَرْتَعِدُ مِنْهُ فَرائِصُ مَلائِكَتِكَ
english translation text: in the name of Thy name which makes Thy Angels change to and fro with ease their movement
I beseech Thee in the name of Jabra-eel, Meekaa-eel and Israafeel

arabic text: وَبِحَقِّ مُحَمَّد الْمُصْطَفى صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: in the name of Muhammad Al Mustafa, blessings of Allah be on him and on his children
and on all the Prophets and on the Angels

arabic text: وَبِالاِْسْمِ الَّذى مَشى بِهِ الْخِضْرُ عَلى قُلَلِ الْمآءِ
english translation text: in the name of the name with Khizr recited to walk over the tidal waves

arabic text: كَما مَشى بِهِ عَلى جَدَدِ الاَْرْضِ
english translation text: as he used to walk on the hard level ground

arabic text: وَبِاِسْمِكَ الَّذى فَلَقْتَ بِهِ الْبَحْرَ لِموُسى
english translation text: in the name of Thy name which divided the sea (laid open a track of land) for Moosaa
but drowned Firawn and his followers

arabic text: وَاَنْجَيْتَ بِهِ موُسَى بْنَ عِمْرانَ وَمَنْ مَعَهُ
english translation text: and delivered safely (to the shore) Moosa son of Imran together with those who were with him

arabic text: وَبِاِسْمِكَ الَّذى دَعاكَ بِهِ موُسَى بْنُ عِمْران
english translation text: in the name of Thy name which summoned Moosa son of Imran
to come to the blessed Toor

arabic text: فَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ وَاَلْقَيْتَ عَلَيْهِ مَحَبَّةً مِنْكَ
english translation text: and gave answer to his request, filled him with Thy love

arabic text: وَبِاِسْمِكَ الَّذى بِهِ اَحْيى عيسَى بْنُ مَرْيَمَ الْمَوْتى
english translation text: in the name of Thy name which Isa son of Maryam used for bringing the dead to life
(which) made the just born (Isa) talk clearly (sitting) in his cradle
(and when he grew up) cure the born blind and the lepers

arabic text: وَبِاِسْمِكَ الَّذى دَعاكَ بِهِ حَمَلَةُ عَرْشِكَ
english translation text: in the name of Thy name which makes the bearers of Thy Arsh
Jibraa-il, Mikaa-eel, Israafeel

arabic text: وَحَبيبِكَ مُحَمَّدٌ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: Thy intimate friend and confidant, Muhammad (blessings of Allah be on him and on his children)
Thy confidential Angels
the Prophets appointed by Thee, and Thy chosen upright servants
among the inhabitants of the heavens and the earths
pray for Thy blessings
in the name of Thy name Zunnoon (Yoonus) recited to invoke Thee

arabic text: فَظَنَّ اَنْ لَنْ نَقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ فَنادى فِى الظُّلُماتِ
english translation text: when he went off in anger and deemed that we had no power over him but he cried out in the darkness
saying. "There is no god save Thee
Be Thou glorified! Verily, I have been a wrongdoer."
Then We heard his prayer and saved him from the anguish
Thus We save the believers

arabic text: وَبِاِسْمِكَ الْعَظيمِ الَّذى دَعاكَ بِهِ داوُدُ
english translation text: in the name of Thy great name Dawood recited
and prostrated himself in adoration
so Thou forgave him

arabic text: آسِيَةُ امْرَأَةُ فِرْعَوْنَ وَبِاِسْمِكَ الَّذى دَعَتْكَ بِهِ
english translation text: the name of Thy name Aasiya wife of Firawn recited

arabic text: اِذْ قالَتْ رَبِّ ابْنِ لى عِنْدَكَ بَيْتاً فِى الْجَنَّةِ
english translation text: when she said: "My Lord! Build for me a home with Thee in the Paradise
and deliver me from Firawn and his work
and deliver me from evildoing folk
then Thou heard her prayer
in the name of Thy name Ayyoob recited
when he was surrounded by calamities and Thou removed that adversity (from which he suffered)
and Thou gave him his household (that he had lost)
and like thereof alongwith them, a mercy from Thy (store)
and remembrance for the worshippers

arabic text: وَبِاِسْمِكَ الَّذى دَعاكَ بِهِ يَعْقوُبُفَرَدَدْتَ عَلَيْهِ بَصَرَهُ
english translation text: in the name of Thy name that gave back sight to Yaqoob
and also brought together him and the apple of his eyes, Yusuf
in the name of Thy name that bestowed on Sulayman a Kingdom

arabic text: فَوَهَبْتَ لَهُ مُلْكاً لا يَنْبَغى لاَِحَد مِنْ بَعْدِهِ
english translation text: such as did not belong to any after him
verily Thou art the Bestower
the name of Thy name which requisitioned "Buraaq" (on which the Holy Prophet ascended to heaven)

arabic text: لُِمحَمَّد صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسَلِّمَ
english translation text: for Muhammad (blessings of Allah and peace be for him and his children)
when the Praiseworthy said

arabic text: سُبْحانَ الَّذى اَسْرى بِعَبْدِهِ لَيْلاً مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ الْحرامِ
english translation text: Glorified be He who carried His servant by night from the "inviolable place of worship"
to the "Far distant place of worship"

arabic text: وَقَوْلُهُ: سُبْحانَ الَّذى سَخَّرَ لَنا هذا
english translation text: and said he (the Holy Prophet): "Glorified be He who has subdued these unto us
and we were not capable (of subduing them)
and verily, unto our Lord we return"
in the name of Thy name with which Jibra-eel was commissioned

arabic text: عَلى مُحَمَّد صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: to call upon Muhammad, blessings of Allah be on him and on his children
in the name of Thy name Adam recited to seek Thy forgiveness
so Thou overlooked his mistake
and allowed him to stay in Thy Paradise
I beseech Thee in the name of the evident proof of the glorious, decisive Holy Quran
in the name of the preserving reason and good Muhammad, the last Prophet
in the name of the sincerity of Ibrahim
in the name of the just and lawful decisions Thou will make on the Day of Judgement
in the name of the "what is as it ought to be" comparison and compensation system that will be set up
and the "books of accounts" which shall be laid open
in the name of the real and true writing (Qalam)
and the slate (Lawh) contains
in the name of the Glory of the name Thou and written
on the borders of the "Arsh"
two thousand years before Thou created
the sun, the moon, the earth and all that has been created

arabic text: وَاَشْهَدُ اَنْ لا اِلـهَ اِلاَّ اللهُ
english translation text: I testify that there is no god save Allah
He is Single, has no associate
and that Muhammad is His Servant and Messenger
I beseech Thee in the name of Thy name

arabic text: فى خَزآئِنِكَ الَّذى اسْتَأثَرْتَ بِهِ فى عِلْمِ الْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ
english translation text: Thou keeps an eye on, safely treasured in Thy unknowable depository

arabic text: لَمْ يَظْهَرْ عَلَيْهِ اَحَدٌ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
english translation text: known to Thee alone, no one from among Thy creation can (even) snatch a momentary view

arabic text: لا مَلَكٌ مُقَرَّبٌ وَلا نَبِىٌّ مُرْسَلٌ
english translation text: nor the nearby Angels, nor the appointed Prophets
nor any chosen servant

arabic text: وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِاِسْمِكَ الَّذى شَقَقْتَ بِهِ الْبِحارَ
english translation text: I beseech Thee in the name of They name that separated the oceans
hoisted the mountains
made day and night follow each other
for the sake of "the twice revealed seven verses" (Al-Fatih'ah)
and the Great Quran
, for the sake of the "noble scribes" "(Kiramul Kaatibeen-the Angels who write down our deeds)
for the sake of "Taha". "Yasin"
"Kaf-Ha-Yaa-Ayyn- Saad", "Ha-Meem-Ayyn- Seen-Qaaf"
for the sake of Tawrat, given to Musa; and Injeel, given to Isa
and Zuboor, given to Dawood; and the Holy Quran, given to Muhammad
Allah's blessings be on him and on his children
and on the Messengers
and for the sake of ) "I am I" (Allah had said to Musa)
O my Allah! I beseech Thee
in the name of the conference that took place

arabic text: كانَتْ بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَ موُسَى بْنِ عَمْرانَ
english translation text: between Thee and Moosaa son of Imran
on the mountain of "Toor Sina"
I beseech Thee in the name of Thy name
that gives a sign to the "Angel of Death" at the time of taking away souls from the bodies

arabic text: وَاَسْاَلُكَ بِاِسْمِكَ الَّذى كُتِبَ عَلى وَرَقِ الزَّيْتوُنِ
english translation text: I beseech Thee in the name of Thy name, written on the leaf of (an) olive tree
the leaf (which) calmed down the flames of the fire

arabic text: فَقُلْتُ يا نارُ كوُنى بَرْداً وَسَلاماً
english translation text: (when) Thou said: "Be coolness and peace (for Ibrahim)."
I beseech Thee in the name of Thy name
Thou wrote on the canopy, covering the "surpassing glory and generosity"
O He! Those (who) make repeated requests
and those who get what they want
O He who is besought
and unto Him turn (all) to take refuge

arabic text: اَسْاَلُكَ بِمَعاقِدِ الْعِزِّ مِنْ عَرْشِكَ وَمُنْتَهَى الرَّحْمَةِ مِنْ كِتابِكَ
english translation text: I beseech Thee in the name of "hard of understand" rare but highly satisfying and loving kindness, out flowing from Thy "seat of authority" (Arsh)
and Thy complete, perfect "words" of highest excellence
O my Allah! Lord of the winds, (and of that which they carry off, sprinkle and scatter)
and the skies, (and of that which they cover, shade and support)
and the earth, (and of that which it bears and carry)
and of the devils, (and of that which they cause to go astray and lose)
and of the oceans and rivers, (and of that which they urge to run, flow and cause to circulate)

arabic text: وَبِحَقِّ كُلِّ حَقٍّ هُوَ عَلَيْكَ حَقٌّ
english translation text: for the sake of all truths, (everything) concerning Thee is truth
for the sake of Thy confidential Angels
souls resting in peace

arabic text: وَالْمُسَبِّحينَ لَكَ بِاللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهارِ لا يَفْتَروُنَ
english translation text: celestial spirits, and those, singing Thy praise and glory day and night, (who) never grow tired, slack or relax
for the sake of Ibraheem, they close friend

arabic text: وَبِحَقِّ كُلِّ وَلِىٍّ يُناديكَ بَيْنَ الصَّفا وَالْمَرْوَةِ
english translation text: and all Thy loving devotees (who call upon and pray to Thee between Safa and Marwa
and Thou gives answer to their prayers
O the fulfiller of prayers!
I beseech Thee in the name of all these names
and all these prayers
to show mercy to us (forgive us) for that which we have done
(that which) we shall do, (that which) we did not covered up

arabic text: وَما اَعْلَنّا وَما اَبْدَيْنا وَما اَخْفَيْنا
english translation text: (that which) we did and made public, (that which) we did seriously, (that which) we did frivolously (light-mindedly)
Art Thou not aware of (them) more than us?
Verily (no doubt there is) Thou art able to do all things
on account of Thy mercy, O the most Merciful.
O He who watches over every wayfarer!
O He who gives company to every forsaken lonesome!
O He Who defends every sick and weak
O He who comes to the help of every oppressed!
O He Who gives livelihood to every excluded outcast!
O He Who cheers up every lonely solitaire!
O he Who goes with every traveling stranger!
He who supports every settled inhabitant!
O He Who overlooks faults and mistakes!
O He who lends a helping hand to whoso seeks help!
O He Who brings assistance to whoso cries out for help!
O He Who makes less the agony and anguish of the grieved!
O He who gives comfort to whoso is an object of sorrow and solicitude!
O He who created the heavens and the earths!
O He who is the ultimate last resource of whatever is desired and asked for!
O He Who gives answer to whoso cries out in desperation!
O the Most Merciful!
O the Lord of the worlds!
O the Requiter of the Day of Judgement!
O the Most Generous!
O the Most Kind!
O the Best Hearer!
O the Best Seer!
the Most Powerful!

arabic text: اِغْفِرْ لِىَ الذُّنوُبَ الَّتى تُغَيِّرُ النِّعَمَ
english translation text: Forgive me my sins that swerve the flow of bounties

arabic text: وَاغْفِرْ لِىَ الذُّنوُبَ الَّتى توُرِثُ النَّدَمَ
english translation text: Forgive me my sins that give birth to remorse

arabic text: وَاغْفِرْ لِىَ الذُّنوُبَ الَّتى توُرَثُ السَّقَمَ
english translation text: Forgive me my sins that bring upon depression

arabic text: وَاغْفِرْ لِىَ الذُّنوُبَ الَّتى تَهْتِكُ الْعِصَمَ
english translation text: Forgive me my sins that put asunder integrity

arabic text: وَاغْفِرْ لِىَ الذُّنوُبَ الَّتى تَرُدُّ الدُّعآءَ
english translation text: Forgive me my sins that nullify prayers

arabic text: وَاغْفِرْ لِىَ الذُّنوُبَ الَّتى تَحْبِسُ قَطْرَ السَّمآءِ
english translation text: Forgive me my sins that hold back that which drops (mercy) from the heaven

arabic text: وَاغْفِرْ لِىَ الذُّنوُبَ الَّتى تُعَجِّلُ الْفَنآءَ
english translation text: Forgive me my sins that urge to bring quickly nothingness and non-existence

arabic text: وَاغْفِرْ لِىَ الذُّنوُبَ الَّتى تَجْلِبُ الشَّقآءَ
english translation text: Forgive me my sins that bring disorder and chaos in thought and purpose

arabic text: وَاغْفِرْ لِىَ الذُّنوُبَ الَّتى تُظْلِمُ الْهَوآءَ
english translation text: Forgive me my sins that expose and lay bare shelter and security

arabic text: وَاغْفِرْ لِىَ الذُّنوُبَ الَّتى تَكْشِفُ الْغِطآءَ
وَاغْفِرْ لِىَ الذُّنوُبَ الَّتى لا يَغْفِرُها غَيْرُكَ
english translation text: Forgive me my sins that no one can forgive other than Thee

arabic text: وَاحْمِلْ عَنّى كُلَّ تَبِعَة لاَِحَد مِنْ خَلْقِكَ يا اَللهُ
english translation text: O Allah! Take off the load (burden of sins) from my back belonging to any one from among Thy creation

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْ لى مِنْ اَمْرى فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً وَيُسْراً
english translation text: make haste in my affairs, freed of care, brought into focus, and made easy
into my heart sure and certain belief in Thee
and impress into my mind hope in and quest for Thee
till I turn to no one other than Thee
My Allah protect me, keep me safe in my position
be my constant companion in darkness and light
in (the hour of) comfort, in hardships
in success, in misfortune
in gain, in loss
make easy my course
conduct of life be good
do not leave me in the lurch, forsaken in distress or difficulty
guide me O the Best Guide

arabic text: وَلا تَكِلْنى اِلى نَفْسى فِى الاُْموُرِ
english translation text: do not let me look repeatedly at my vain desires while carrying out day to day work
let me find happiness every where
make me team up with my family, happy and successful
in this quickly passing life and at the appointed time
certainly Thou art able to do all things.
Give me the provisions of life as much as Thy generosity approves
open up for me the doors of Thy plenteous, good and clean store of possessions
put me to work in Thy obedience
keep me safe from fire and fury

arabic text: وَاقْلِبْنى اِذا تَوَفَّيْتَنى اِلى جَنَّتِكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ
english translation text: when I die be merciful and direct my journey to Thy Paradise

arabic text: اَللّـهُمَّ اِنّى اَعوُذُ بِكَ مِنْ زَوالِ نِعْمَتِكَ
english translation text: O my Allah, in Thee do I seek refuge from the disappearance of Thy bounties
from discontinuation of welfare Thou made available for me
from the torment that may come upon me
the penalty that comes down upon (us)
from the disasters that vex and molest
from the misery (and distress) that takes hold of and lingers on
from violent and painful death
from the pride and joy of the enemies

arabic text: وَمِنْ شَرِّ ما يَنْزِلُ مِنَ السَّمآءِ
english translation text: from the evil that falls down from the skies

arabic text: وَمِنْ شَرِّ ما فِى الْكِتابِ الْمُنْزَلِ
english translation text: from the evil which has been pointed out in the revealed Book
O my Allah! Do not make me be among the evildoers
nor be among the dwellers of Hell
do not keep me out of enjoyment found in the company of the good
make me live a clear and honest life
and die a tranquil death
unite me (after death) with the select pious
let me keep company with the Prophets

arabic text: فى مَقْعَدِ صِدْق عِنْدَ مَليك مُقْتَدِر
english translation text: in the abode of good repute, near the omnipotent seat of authority

arabic text: اَللّـهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلى حُسْنِ بَلائِكَ وَصُنْعِكَ
english translation text: O my Allah! (All) praise is for Thee (alone), (for) Thy smooth and fair system of test and trail (so) clever and skilful
(All) praise is for Thee (alone), (for) Islam
and (making all) follow the "way of life" (of Muhammad (s.a.)
O Lord, just as Thou had guided them to Thy religion
and taught (revealed) them Thy Book
so guide us and teach us as well

arabic text: وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلى حُسْنِ بَلائِكَ وَصُنْعِكَ عِنْدى
english translation text: (All) praise is for Thee (alone), (for Thy smooth and fair system of test and trail (so) clever and skilful
particularly for me
just as Thou created me, (how wonderful is my creation!)
and taught me, how thorough is my learning!)
and showed me the right path, (how complete is the guidance I received!)

arabic text: فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلى اِنْعامِكَ عَلَىَّ قَديماً وَحَديثاً
english translation text: (All) praise is for Thee (alone), (for) Thy bounties bestowed upon me, earlier and present

arabic text: فَكَمْ مِنْ كَرْب يا سَيِّدى قَدْ فَرَّجْتَهُ
english translation text: How my agonies, O my Master, Thou has dispelled!

arabic text: وَكَمْ مِنْ غَمٍّ يا سَيِّدى قَدْ نَفَّسْتَهُ
english translation text: How many sorrows, O my Master, Thou has hushed!

arabic text: وَ كَمْ مِنْ هَمّ يا سيِّدى قَد كَشَفتَه
english translation text: How many hardships, O my Master, Thou has put to flight!

arabic text: وَكَم مَنْ بَلاء يا سيِّدى قَد صَرفَتَه
english translation text: How many disasters, O my Master, Thou has dispersed!

arabic text: وَكَمْ مِنْ عَيْب يا سَيِّدى قَدْ سَتَرْتَهُ
english translation text: How many defects, O my Master, Thou has covered!

arabic text: فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلى كُلِّ حال فى كُلِّ مَثْوىً
english translation text: So (all) praise is for Thee (alone), under all circumstances, in every place
at all times, in chaos, and in order
in the present moment and at all occasions

arabic text: اَللّـهُمَّ اجْعَلْنى مِنْ اَفْضَلِ عِبادِكَ نَصيباً فى هذَا الْيَوْمِ
english translation text: O Allah give me also from the gifts Thy deserving servants win, and duly distributed today

arabic text: مِنْ خَيْر تَقْسِمُهُ اَوْ ضُرٍّ تَكْشِفُهُ
اَوْ سُوء تَصْرِفُهُ اَوْ بَلاء تَدْفَعُهُ
english translation text: or the evil sent away from them, or the disaster warded off from them

arabic text: اَوْ خَيْر تَسوُقُهُ اَوْ رَحْمَة تَنْشُرُها
english translation text: or the good urged on to reach them, or the mercy scattered and spread out
or the welfare that mingles and gets around
so (there is no doubt) Thou art able to do all things
In Thy hands are the treasures of the heavens and the earth

arabic text: وَاَنْتَ الْواحِدُ الْكَريمُ الْمُعْطِى الَّذى لا يُرَدَّ سآئِلُهُ
english translation text: Thou art One, the Kindest Giver who does not send away one who makes a request to Him
nor disappoints one who expects to get what one wants from Him
nor there is any defect or shortage in what one obtains from Him

arabic text: وَلا يَنْفَدُ ما عِنْدَهُ بَلْ يَزْدادُ كَثْرَةً
english translation text: nor dries up and goes waste that which comes from Him
on the contrary grows more and more, (is) clean, freely given, (out of) generosity and favour

arabic text: وَارْزُقْنى مِنْ خَزآئِنِكَ الَّتى لا تَفْنى
english translation text: Give me from Thy treasures that which never get exhausted
on account of Thy merciful love and kindness
boundless and fathomless is Thy grant that neither withholds nor is inaccessible
Thou art able to do all things
through Thy mercy.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah send Your blessings on Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
